title: Coinbase Brings Global Crypto Derivatives Markets to US Institutional Clients
summary: Coinbase now offers eligible US institutional investors access to global crypto options and perpetual futures through Deribit, providing regulated access to sophisticated derivatives products.
body:
Coinbase has integrated with Deribit, allowing eligible US institutional clients to trade global crypto options and perpetual futures. This partnership brings sophisticated derivatives products to a regulated US market, which previously had limited access to such global crypto trading options.

The collaboration enables eligible US institutions to tap into Deribit’s extensive range of crypto derivatives, including options and perpetual futures. These products are typically popular among professional traders for hedging and speculative strategies. Coinbase’s regulatory compliance ensures that these offerings are available within the legal framework of the United States.

This development is significant for US institutional investors who previously had limited access to global crypto derivatives markets. It provides them with more tools to manage risk and potentially increase returns in the volatile crypto market. The move also highlights the growing demand for regulated crypto trading products among large investors.

For investors, this means more opportunities to diversify their portfolios with crypto derivatives. They should watch for further regulatory developments and market trends that could impact these products. Institutions interested in these offerings should consult with their financial advisors to understand the risks and benefits.
twitterThread: Eligible US institutions can now trade global crypto options & perpetual futures via Coinbase & Deribit. A big step for regulated access.
Coinbase’s integration with Deribit brings sophisticated derivatives to the US market, offering hedging and speculative tools for professional traders.
Institutions should consult advisors to explore these new opportunities. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-30-coinbase-opens-global-crypto-derivatives-to-us-institutions
standaloneTweet: Eligible US institutions can now trade global crypto derivatives through Coinbase. This expands their options for hedging and speculation in the crypto market.
